opinion.h: The Lessee of Hyam and others v. Edwards
opinion.p: Copy of a Deed inrolled in the King's Bench in England, proved before the Lord Mayor of London to be a true one; allowed to be given in Evidence to a Jury to support a Title to Lands in this Province.*
[Footnote *] 11 mod. 2 c. 2. [ Hyam's Lessee v. Edwards
